response.global_analysis: Primary focus is transcribing the English dialogue between the members of Hololive Advent and the character Pokey. While the reference JSON provides lyrics for the background song 'Seishun no Archive', these are discarded in favor of the foreground dialogue as per the primary priority. Transcribed all on-screen dialogue boxes and UI elements for 'Master of Advent' to ensure secondary priority requirements are met. Timing is strictly synchronized with vocal delivery and on-screen text appearances.

subtitles.original: This is my first bathing suit buy!
subtitles.english: This is my first swimsuit purchase!

subtitles.original: What do you think?
subtitles.english: What do you think?

subtitles.original: Shiori, come here!
subtitles.english: Shiori, come here!

subtitles.original: Shiori on the shore? No...
subtitles.english: Shiori on the shore? No...

subtitles.original: Shiori on the... at your service!
subtitles.english: Shiori on the... at your service!

subtitles.original: And look at my little ribbon!
subtitles.english: And look at my little ribbon!

subtitles.original: Okay, you can do this, Mococo-chan!
subtitles.english: Okay, you can do this, Mococo-chan!

subtitles.original: Fuwawa! Fuwawa!
subtitles.english: Fuwawa! Fuwawa!

subtitles.original: I... this is so big!
subtitles.english: I... this is so big!

subtitles.original: Look at those cute shorts!
subtitles.english: Look at those cute shorts!

subtitles.original: She's so cute!
subtitles.english: She's so cute!

subtitles.original:
But there's something a bit special
on this outfit.
subtitles.english:
But there's something a bit special
on this outfit.

subtitles.original: Don't you think? If you go down...
subtitles.english: Don't you think? If you go down...

subtitles.original: Oh, there it is! There it is!
subtitles.english: Oh, there it is! There it is!

subtitles.original: Oh, I see it! Wow!
subtitles.english: Oh, I see it! Wow!

subtitles.original: Don't look there too much.
subtitles.english: Don't look there too much.

subtitles.original: But if you come up, you can see my waist...
subtitles.english: But if you come up, you can see my waist...

subtitles.original: and my top... armpits!
subtitles.english: and my top... armpits!

subtitles.original: Oh yes! The pits!
subtitles.english: Oh yes! The pits!

subtitles.original: But I see something strange off in the distance.
subtitles.english: But I see something strange off in the distance.

subtitles.original: Just wait, let me go see.
subtitles.english: Just wait, let me go see.

subtitles.original: Oh! It's a selfie stick!
subtitles.english: Oh! It's a selfie stick!

subtitles.original: Everyone, get behind me!
subtitles.english: Everyone, get behind me!

subtitles.original: Let's take a picture together!
subtitles.english: Let's take a picture together!

subtitles.original: Nice!
subtitles.english: Nice!

subtitles.original: Why are you so tall?
subtitles.english: Why are you so tall?

subtitles.original: Oh, that helps!
subtitles.english: Oh, that helps!

subtitles.original: There's something down there in the sand.
subtitles.english: There's something down there in the sand.

subtitles.original: Something down there?
subtitles.english: Something down there?

subtitles.original: I think that's an adventuress?
subtitles.english: I think that's an adventuress?

subtitles.original: Oh! Step on it!
subtitles.english: Oh! Step on it!

subtitles.original: Oh, step on that!
subtitles.english: Oh, step on that!

subtitles.original: Let's go to the water!
subtitles.english: Let's go to the water!

subtitles.original: Mococo-chan, don't drown!
subtitles.english: Mococo-chan, don't drown!

subtitles.original: I can swim!
subtitles.english: I can swim!

subtitles.original: Running in slow mo!
subtitles.english: Running in slow mo!

subtitles.original: Let's just keep running on the beach!
subtitles.english: Let's just keep running on the beach!

subtitles.original: Let me go put this thing down, okay?
subtitles.english: Let me go put this thing down, okay?

subtitles.original: My arm's getting tired. Selfie arm tired.
subtitles.english: My arm's getting tired. Selfie arm tired.

subtitles.original: Thank you for being such a tall person.
subtitles.english: Thank you for being such a tall person.

subtitles.original: Oh my gosh, it's Pokey!
subtitles.english: Oh my gosh, it's Pokey!

subtitles.original: Hey now! Save the beach party for later!
subtitles.english: Hey now! Save the beach party for later!

subtitles.original: Sandcastles later, survival now!
subtitles.english: Sandcastles later, survival now!

subtitles.original: I thought we were supposed to be safe here.
subtitles.english: I thought we were supposed to be safe here.

subtitles.original: Yeah, what gives? Let's enjoy our time.
subtitles.english: Yeah, what gives? Let's enjoy our time.

subtitles.original:
This is Justice we're dealing with!
Expect the unexpected!
subtitles.english:
This is Justice we're dealing with!
Expect the unexpected!

subtitles.original:
What should we do next then?
Do we have to run forever?
subtitles.english:
What should we do next then?
Do we have to run forever?

subtitles.original:
Don't panic, I have a plan.
Prove your bonds in the next trial.
subtitles.english:
Don't panic, I have a plan.
Prove your bonds in the next trial.

subtitles.original: The power of friendship? Nakama power?
subtitles.english: The power of friendship? Nakama power?

subtitles.original:
Well, since this is the beach episode,
we have to do it, right?
subtitles.english:
Well, since this is the beach episode,
we have to do it, right?

subtitles.original:
Good. Something's been arranged.
Look down! A & B!
subtitles.english:
Good. Something's been arranged.
Look down! A & B!

subtitles.original: A & B? Not your alphabet?
subtitles.english: A & B? Not your alphabet?

subtitles.original: That's so lame! / A! B!
subtitles.english: That's so lame! / A! B!

subtitles.original: C-can it! Silence!
subtitles.english: C-can it! Silence!

subtitles.original:
To confirm your bonds,
you'll take on 'Master of Advent'.
subtitles.english:
To confirm your bonds,
you'll take on 'Master of Advent'.

subtitles.original:
Master of Advent
(Adventわかってて)
subtitles.english:
Master of Advent
(Understanding Advent)

subtitles.original:
The rules are simple! Each participant
will be asked a two-option question.
subtitles.english:
The rules are simple! Each participant
will be asked a two-option question.

subtitles.original:
You guys are Team Tomodachi,
so it should be pretty easy, right...?
subtitles.english:
You guys are Team Tomodachi,
so it should be pretty easy, right...?

subtitles.original: Team Tomodachi? Advent forever!
subtitles.english: Team Tomodachi? Advent forever!

subtitles.original:
Exactly. But incorrect answers mean...
your bonds are weak.
subtitles.english:
Exactly. But incorrect answers mean...
your bonds are weak.

subtitles.original:
Penalty? Not again!
I didn't consent to this!
subtitles.english:
Penalty? Not again!
I didn't consent to this!

subtitles.original:
Yeah, a penalty game.
Now, goth girl, take over.
subtitles.english:
Yeah, a penalty game.
Now, goth girl, take over.

subtitles.original:
Anyway, I think that we're going to get
one question, two answers.
subtitles.english:
Anyway, I think that we're going to get
one question, two answers.

subtitles.original:
But only one is right. If you get it wrong,
I think you're going to get muddied.
subtitles.english:
But only one is right. If you get it wrong,
I think you're going to get muddied.

subtitles.original: No! I don't want to get muddied in this thing!
subtitles.english: No! I don't want to get muddied in this thing!

subtitles.original:
So when you make your answer,
I want you to hop there, okay?
subtitles.english:
So when you make your answer,
I want you to hop there, okay?

subtitles.original: I'll go first as an example.
subtitles.english: I'll go first as an example.

subtitles.original: Number one: Which would Shiori rather be?
subtitles.english: Number one: Which would Shiori rather be?

subtitles.original: A vampire for A, or a werewolf for B?
subtitles.english: A vampire for A, or a werewolf for B?

subtitles.original: On the count of three, okay?
subtitles.english: On the count of three, okay?

subtitles.original: Three, two...
subtitles.english: Three, two...
